reference: Dear Sir, the symptom that you are describing is called paraspinal muscle spasm. This occurs when your back muscles are involved in some unaccustomed activity. They go into a spasm, and this gives rise to the pain. I suggest you rest the affected area by lying on your back, and muscle relaxants along with analgesics will be helpful. Local analgesic creams and local heat will also assist.
